commit.subject: LU-19056 ptlrpc: squash getxattr -EOPNOTSUPP
commit.message:
LU-19056 ptlrpc: squash getxattr -EOPNOTSUPP

This is seen a new kernels but does not appear to be real issue.

Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
